title: Advanced Off-Page SEO & Link Building Expert Needed for SMM Panel
desc:
I am looking for an experienced SEO specialist to handle advanced Off-Page SEO and link-building strategies for my SMM Panel. The niche is highly competitive, so standard white-hat guest posting alone will not be enough. I need someone who understands creative, high-impact link-building strategies.
​What you will be doing:
​Tiered Link Building: Creating a safe and structured Tier 1 and Tier 2 backlink profile.
​Web 2.0 Properties: Setting up and manually managing high-quality Web 2.0 blogs to pass link juice.
​Expired Domains 301 Redirects: Finding clean, high DA/DR expired domains relevant to marketing/social media and setting up proper redirects (if required).
​Niche Edits & Forum Posting: Securing links in existing indexable articles and driving contextual traffic from platforms like Quora, Reddit, and specialized marketing forums.
​Brand Mentions: Generating natural-looking social signals and brand mentions to balance the link velocity.
​What I DO NOT want (Strict Rules):
​No automated spam blasts (No GSA Search Engine Ranker, ScrapeBox, or XRumer).
​No toxic, spammy PBNs that leave footprints.
​No exact-match keyword stuffing in anchor texts (we need a natural anchor text ratio).
​Requirements:
​Must have previous experience ranking websites in competitive niches (like SMM, gaming, or crypto).
​Must provide a weekly report of live, indexed links.
​Deep understanding of search engine crawl budgets and indexing.
​To Apply:
Please start your proposal with the word "RANKING

title: Android Inventory Management App
desc:
I’m ready to turn an idea for a dedicated Android inventory application into a polished, production-ready APK. The entire focus is stock control: adding new items on the fly, adjusting quantities, and seeing what’s running low without having to open a laptop.  

Here’s the big picture I have in mind:  
• Fast, clean Material-styled interface  
• Item creation with barcode or QR scanning, photo upload, and basic categorisation  
• Real-time adjustments (add, remove, transfer) with an easy-to-read activity log  
• Search and filter by SKU, location, or custom tags  
• Low-stock push notifications and an optional daily summary  
• CSV / Excel import-export so I can bulk load or back up data at any time  
• Email or token-based sign-in that can grow into multi-user roles later  

I’m open on the underlying tech—Kotlin with Jetpack libraries or Flutter are both acceptable as long as the finished product installs cleanly on current Android versions and you keep the code well commented. If a small backend or cloud sync is needed, propose a lightweight solution that won’t break the bank.  

Deliverables I expect:  
1. Full source code in a Git repo  
2. A signed, installable APK  
3. Quick-start documentation and API/end-point notes if you spin up a backend  
4. One post-delivery bug-fix round  

When you reply, let me know which major libraries or frameworks you’ll lean on, any similar apps you’ve shipped, and a realistic timeline to reach a first test build.

title: Team-Focused Android Info-Sharing App -- 2
desc:
I'm in need of an experienced mobile app developer, preferably versed in Android development, to craft an app for my team to share information more efficiently.

Key requirements include:

- The app needs to cater solely to Android devices.
- It should possess a user-friendly interface for easy usage.
- The primary function of this app is for information sharing among team members.
  
Ideal Skills:

- Proven experience in Android app development.
- Familiarity with cloud services for real-time info-syncing.
- Strong UI/UX skills.
- Good grasp of data security and privacy principles.

The goal is to have an app that will enable clear and efficient information sharing within my team. Your input on ways to enhance functionality will be highly appreciated.

title: AI Avatar Content Production Platform 24/7
desc:
AI Avatar Factory – Build an Autonomous 24/7 AI Content Platform (n8n • OpenAI • AI Avatars • PostgreSQL • Railway • GitHub)
ABOUT NEVIE-GLOBAL

NEVIE-GLOBAL is a French technology company developing an ecosystem around Artificial Intelligence, Enterprise Automation, SaaS, Blockchain, Robotics, IoT, Wearable Technology and Digital Education.

We are building a next-generation Autonomous AI Avatar Factory capable of automatically creating, managing and publishing AI-generated content 24 hours a day, 7 days a week with minimal human intervention.

This is not a one-time project.

We are looking for a reliable long-term technical partner capable of designing, building and continuously improving this platform over a minimum period of three months, with many future projects available for successful candidates.

Our objective is to build a production-oriented platform that remains scalable, maintainable, modular and fully owned by NEVIE-GLOBAL.

PROJECT OBJECTIVE

The goal is to build a complete AI-powered content factory able to automatically generate, validate, render and publish content across multiple social media platforms.

The architecture must be designed for long-term scalability and continuous autonomous operation.

The platform should eventually include:

AI Script Generation
Prompt Management
Knowledge Base
AI Agents
AI Voice Generation
AI Avatar Generation
AI Video Rendering
Subtitle Generation
Thumbnail Generation
Title Generation
Description Generation
Hashtag Genera

title: Cross-Platform Driver Updater Application
desc:
I'm looking for an experienced C#/.NET desktop application developer to build a commercial Driver Updater software for Windows and Linux.

The application should scan the system, detect installed hardware drivers, compare them with the latest versions from an online driver database/API, and display all drivers categorized as Up-to-Date or Update Available.

Required Features
Scan and detect all installed hardware drivers.
Display driver details (Device Name, Version, Date, Manufacturer, Hardware ID, Status).
Show which drivers are updated and which require updates.
Free Version
Scan system
View all drivers
Manual (one-by-one) driver updates
Pro Version
One-click update for all drivers
Automatic download and installation
Driver backup before updates
Scheduled scans
Background updates
Driver Backup & Restore
Driver Uninstaller
License activation (1-year subscription)
Website integration for purchasing and activating the Pro version.
Automatic application updates.
Preferred Technology
C# / .NET 8 or .NET 9
Avalonia UI (preferred) or another cross-platform framework
Windows & Linux support
REST API integration
Deliverables
Complete source code
Professional UI
Windows installer (.exe/.msi)
Linux package (.AppImage/.deb/.rpm)
Documentation and build instructions
Please Include in Your Proposal
Similar desktop applications you've developed.
Your recommended architecture and technology stack.
How you'll implement driver detection and the driver catalog/database.
Estimated timeline an
